evals.prompt: Create a FastAPI router for a 'products' resource with full CRUD endpoints. Include Pydantic schemas (ProductCreate, ProductUpdate, ProductResponse), proper status codes, and a get_db dependency. The update endpoint should be a PATCH that only applies provided fields.
evals.expected_output: APIRouter with prefix='/products', Pydantic v2 schemas using BaseModel (with all-Optional fields on ProductUpdate), CRUD routes with correct status codes (201 for POST, 204 for DELETE), response_model on all endpoints, PATCH using model_dump(exclude_unset=True), HTTPException(404) for missing items.

assertions.text: ProductUpdate schema has all fields as Optional (for partial PATCH updates)
PATCH endpoint uses model_dump(exclude_unset=True) to apply only provided fields
POST endpoint uses status_code=201 (HTTP_201_CREATED) for resource creation
GET, POST, PUT/PATCH routes have response_model=ProductResponse
HTTPException(status_code=404) raised when product not found

evals.prompt: Add JWT authentication to my FastAPI app. I need: a login endpoint that returns a Bearer token, a get_current_user dependency using OAuth2PasswordBearer, and a protected /me endpoint. Use python-jose for JWT.
evals.expected_output: OAuth2PasswordBearer(tokenUrl=...), get_current_user dependency using jwt.decode() with JWTError handling, HTTPException(401) with WWW-Authenticate header on failure, /me endpoint using Depends(get_current_user), login endpoint that creates and returns JWT token.

evals.prompt: I have a FastAPI endpoint that returns a SQLAlchemy User ORM object but I don't want to expose the password_hash field. How do I set up the Pydantic response model to automatically exclude it? Show me the schema definition and the route.
evals.expected_output: Pydantic response schema without password_hash field, model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True) on response model, response_model=UserResponse on the route decorator, explanation that response_model filters fields automatically. Uses model_dump() not dict(). Does NOT use orm_mode=True (Pydantic v1 pattern).
